title: Traditional Christmas Red, Silver & Gold Metallic Gift Ribbon Bows – Pack of 16 Festive Present Wrapping Accessories
features: Festive Metallic Mix – Pack of 16 ribbon bows in classic red, silver, and gold metallic shades for elegant Christmas wrapping.
Two Handy Sizes – Includes bows ranging from 4cm to 5cm, perfect for decorating presents, gift bags, and festive hampers.
Easy to Use – Made from plastic and foil, shiny and lightweight, simple to attach for a sparkling finishing touch.
description: Sold: Pack of 16 Pack contains 2 different sizes. Approx sizes vary from 4cm / 1.6 in to 5cm / 2 in Material: Plastic and Foil Includes red, silver and gold paper ribbon bows.
